Home About Us Mission Pre-Enrollment

Welcome to Children Of Promise

Christian Dayschool serving families in Millstadt and surrounding communities.

🏡

9 Acres in Millstadt, IL

Beautiful outdoor space for activities alongside our early childhood programs.

👶

Birth to School Age

Programs for infants, toddlers, 2-year olds, pre-school, and before & afterschool / summer.

📍

Centrally Located

Within 10 miles of Belleville, Dupo, and Cahokia Heights.

📋

DCFS Licensed

Fully licensed and committed to the highest standards of early childhood care.

Start Pre Enrollment

Get In Touch

Interested in enrolling? Fill out our pre-enrollment form or give us a call.
